news.headline: Victor Wembanyama wins NBA Defensive Player of the year in unanimous vote
news.summary: Victor Wembanyama became the first player to unanimously win the NBA Defensive Player of the Year award, receiving all 100 first-place votes, the league said on Monday. The San Antonio Spurs center led the NBA in blocks for a third straight season and is the youngest recipient at 22.
